content:
name: installer-ci

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    tags: ["v*"]

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  installer:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
        node: [20, 22]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}
          cache: npm
      - name: Verify PowerShell
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if ($PSVersionTable.PSVersion.Major -lt 7) {
            throw 'PowerShell 7+ is required'
          }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
        env:
          CONVERSATION_ESAA_SKIP_NETWORK: "1"
      - name: Bootstrap contract
        shell: pwsh
        run: ./tests/test-installer-bootstrap.ps1
      - name: Legacy and RAG regression suites
        if: matrix.node == 22
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./.conversation-esaa/bin/conv-test.ps1
          ./tests/test-rag-adapter.ps1
          ./tests/test-rag-command-contract.ps1
          ./tests/test-rag-permissions.ps1
      - name: Contract parity
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $left = Get-Content AGENTS.md -Raw
          $right = Get-Content .claude/CLAUDE.md -Raw
          if ($left -cne $right) { throw 'AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md differ' }
